description_long: This house features a sprawling single-story layout with a complex, multi-gabled black roof and light-colored brick exterior walls. The front facade is highlighted by a prominent covered entryway with a triangular gable supported by columns, leading to a recessed porch area. Multiple windows of varying sizes are symmetrically arranged along the walls, with some featuring decorative grilles. The roofline is dynamic, incorporating several dormers and intersecting gables, adding architectural interest and depth. The garage is integrated into the main structure, with a large, white paneled door beneath its own gabled roof. The overall design suggests a modern ranch or craftsman influence, blending traditional and contemporary elements.
description: A large, single-story house with a multi-gabled black roof, light brick walls, and a prominent covered entryway. Symmetrical windows and an integrated garage highlight its modern ranch style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, prominent gable, and garage door.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, multiple rooflines, and several windows along the brick wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical window placement, dormers on the roof, and the full width of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the garage extension, additional gables, and the complex roof structure.
attribute_roof_type: gable, with intersecting gables and dormers
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some decorative grilles and dormer windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with triangular gable, columns, steps, and a recessed main door
